expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: blind scenario drafting captures prompt handling, template save, report builder loading, and visible report title outcomes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly lists the four focus areas under “What Phase 4a would need to cover (case focus)” with dedicated sections for “Prompt handling”, “Template save”, “Report builder loading”, and “Visible report title outcomes”. execution_notes.md also states: “The adjacent issue summaries strongly indicate the intended scenario focus areas: - Prompt handling ... - Template save ... - Report builder loading ... - Visible report title outcomes”.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md declares “Primary phase under test: Phase 4a” and grounds the decision in the Phase 4a contract, explaining missing Phase 4a required inputs and listing required artifacts per phase4a-contract.md. It performs a Phase 4a alignment/contract check section rather than executing other phases.
